creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #2)

Hi,

While the distfile itself ships a changelog, this is the changelog from 2.52 to 2.53.  The changes upstream made without bumping the version number do not appear in any changelog.  I found out about them by using the diff(1) utility on the old and new distfiles.  So if you commit this change, make sure to leave the explanation in the commit comment!
